response.overview: The Smith Family Movie is a high-energy,  Live-Action holiday comedy-adventure centered around 12-year-old Aaliyah Smith (played by breakout star Pink Pinkett Jones). The story kicks off during the family’s chaotic, ultra-loud annual Christmas party, where Aaliyah is struggling to get her eccentric relatives to notice her passion for music. To bring everyone together, her aunt surprises the family with an all-expenses-paid winter vacation to a luxury holiday resort.
response.title: The Smith Family Movie
